steps.title: Find the roots
steps.content: Apply the quadratic formula with $a=3, b=-5, c=-5$: $$x=\frac{5\pm\sqrt{25+60}}{6}=\frac{5\pm\sqrt{85}}{6}.$$

steps.title: Identify the greatest solution
steps.content: The larger root is $\tfrac{5}{6}+\tfrac{\sqrt{85}}{6}$. That matches choice B — B is correct.
